meta.title: Amirehsan Noori — AI Systems & Automation Architect
meta.description: I turn complexity into clarity. AI strategy and automation consulting that moves you from chaos to systems.

home.title: Turning complexity into clarity.
home.subtitle: I help founders and teams design AI strategy and automation systems that actually ship — calm, deliberate, and built to last.
home.valueTitle: AI without a system is just noise.
home.valueBody: Most teams don't have an AI problem — they have a systems problem. I bring the architect's lens: map the chaos, design the structure, automate what matters.

pillars.title: Strategy
pillars.body: Cut through hype. Decide where AI creates real leverage for your business.

pillars.title: Architecture
pillars.body: Design clear, durable systems and automations that fit how you actually work.

pillars.title: Execution
pillars.body: Ship working solutions — not slide decks — with a path you can maintain.

services.title: AI Consulting
services.intro: Focused sessions to move you from question to clear next step. Pick the depth you need.

tiers.name: Discovery Call
tiers.body: A short call to understand your goal and see if we're a fit. No prep needed.

tiers.name: Strategy Session
tiers.body: A deep working session on your specific AI or automation challenge, ending with concrete next steps.

services.note: Payment is confirmed before your slot is reserved.

work.title: Selected Work
work.intro: Systems I've architected — turning tangled operations into structured, automated platforms.

projects.name: FinanceOS
projects.body: A unified financial operations platform that replaced scattered spreadsheets with one structured, automated source of truth.

projects.name: Logistics ERP
projects.body: An end-to-end ERP for procurement and logistics, designed to make a complex supply chain legible and controllable.

about.title: About
about.lead: I'm Amirehsan Noori — an architect of AI systems and automation.
about.body: I work like an architect: I see the structure underneath the chaos, then design systems that are clear, durable, and genuinely useful. No hype, no buzzwords — just strategy, structure, and things that work. My role is to take complex, tangled problems and return them to you as calm, well-designed systems.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.intro: Have a project or a question? Send a note and I'll get back to you.
contact.name: Name
